channel.title: How-To Guides on The Prey
channel.description: Recent content in How-To Guides on The Prey

item.title: Create a Game
item.description:
1. Open The Prey app and tap Create Game.
  2. Select a saved playfield or draw a new one. The playfield defines the game boundary.
  3. The app generates a join code. Share it with all participants before proceeding.
  4. Wait for players to join. They appear in the lobby list as they connect.
  5. Tap one player to make them the Hunter. Everyone else is automatically Prey. There is only ever one Hunter.
  6. Make yourself the Hunter, or leave yourself as Prey, if you are playing.
  7. Confirm all players are ready.
  8. Tap Start Game. The head start begins. Prey scatter. The Hunter waits.

item.title: Draw a Playfield
item.description:
1. Open The Prey app and navigate to Playfields.
  2. Tap New Playfield. The map opens centered on your current GPS position.
  3. Tap the map to place your first vertex. A pin appears.
  4. Continue tapping to place each corner of your boundary polygon. Place at least three vertices.
  5. Use pinch to zoom in and out for precision. Use drag on any vertex to reposition it.
  6. To remove a vertex, tap it to select it, then tap the trash button. To add another vertex, tap the map again.
  7. When the shape looks correct, tap Confirm Polygon.
  8. Enter a name for the playfield and tap Save.
  9. The playfield is now available to select when creating a new game.

item.title: GPS Signal Lost
item.description:
1. Check your device’s status bar. A GPS icon with a slash or no icon at all means location services are off or restricted.
  2. Open your device Settings → Location and confirm location is enabled system-wide.
  3. Open Settings → Apps → The Prey → Permissions → Location and confirm it is set to Always Allow.
  4. If the app is in the background, bring it to the foreground. Some devices suspend background GPS when battery saver is active.
  5. Disable Battery Saver mode during gameplay. It restricts background app activity and can cut GPS transmissions.
  6. If signal is still lost, force-close the app and reopen it. The GPS service restarts on launch.
  7. Inform the Game Creator if your signal was lost for an extended period. Decisions about whether that time period counts are at the Game Creator’s discretion.
  8. On Android: if the background service notification disappears from your notification shade, the foreground service has stopped. Reopen the app to restart it.

item.title: Join a Game
item.description:
1. Get the join code from the Game Creator. It is displayed in their app on the game lobby screen.
  2. Open The Prey app on your device.
  3. Tap Join Game on the home screen.
  4. Enter the join code and tap Join.
  5. You land in the lobby. Wait for the Game Creator to assign your role.
  6. Grant location permissions when prompted. Select Always Allow.
  7. Once the Game Creator launches the game, your role screen appears. The head start begins immediately.

item.title: Understand Your Role Mid-Game
item.description:
1. When the game starts, your role screen appears: Prey or Hunter. Read it. It tells you what to do next.
  2. If you are Prey: the head start countdown is on screen. Move immediately, because the Hunter can already see you and is released the moment the head start ends.
  3. If you are Hunter: the head start countdown is on screen too. Use the time to study the playfield boundary and plan your approach.
  4. Open the map tab when the Active Hunt begins. Your position is the center marker. Prey pins appear at their last broadcast location.
  5. As Prey: the map shows the Hunter’s position so you know which direction to avoid. Keep moving. Pinned positions are not real-time, so assume the Hunter is closer than the map shows.
  6. As Hunter: cross-reference Prey pin positions with the terrain. Prey on the edge of the playfield have limited escape routes. Cut them off.
  7. Watch the timer in the top bar. In the final stretch, prey positions update more often, so cover gets harder to keep. Prey, stay hidden and wait it out. Hunter, close in fast.
  8. When the game ends, results are shown automatically. Both Prey and the Hunter see who survived.
